creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: bsam
Date: Wed Sep 19 14:52:36 2012
New Revision: 304531
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/304531

Log:
  Add trytond_google_maps 2.4.0, tryton Application Platform (Google Maps
  Module).
  
  PR:		ports/171503
  Submitted by:	matthias@petermann.it

Added:
  head/www/trytond_google_maps/
  head/www/trytond_google_maps/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/trytond_google_maps/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/trytond_google_maps/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/trytond_google_maps/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/www/Makefile

Modified: head/www/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 14:42:54 2012	(r304530)
+++ head/www/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 14:52:36 2012	(r304531)
@@ -1918,6 +1918,7 @@
     SUBDIR += transmission-web
     SUBDIR += transmission25-web
     SUBDIR += transproxy
+    SUBDIR += trytond_google_maps
     SUBDIR += tt-rss
     SUBDIR += ttf2eot
     SUBDIR += twig

Added: head/www/trytond_google_maps/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/www/trytond_google_maps/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 14:52:36 2012	(r304531)
@@ -0,0 +1,20 @@
+# Created by: Matthias Petermann<matthias@petermann.it>
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	trytond_google_maps
+PORTVERSION=	2.4.0
+CATEGORIES=	www finance python
+MASTER_SITES=	http://downloads2.tryton.org/${PORTVERSION:R}/
+
+MAINTAINER=	matthias@petermann.it
+COMMENT=	Tryton Application Platform (Google Maps Module)
+
+LICENSE=	GPLv3
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	trytond>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond \
+		trytond_party>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond_party
+
+USE_PYTHON=	yes
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=easy_install
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/www/trytond_google_maps/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/www/trytond_google_maps/distinfo	Wed Sep 19 14:52:36 2012	(r304531)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (trytond_google_maps-2.4.0.tar.gz) = 690fbc71d2f5404616e0a0014daf2a3b4172434d97a7c91e2d7b948046a14b7e
+SIZE (trytond_google_maps-2.4.0.tar.gz) = 18542

Added: head/www/trytond_google_maps/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/www/trytond_google_maps/pkg-descr	Wed Sep 19 14:52:36 2012	(r304531)
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+This port adds the Google Maps Module to the Tryton Application Platform.
+
+WWW: http://www.tryton.org/

Added: head/www/trytond_google_maps/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/www/trytond_google_maps/pkg-plist	Wed Sep 19 14:52:36 2012	(r304531)
@@ -0,0 +1,40 @@
